Haneul Instruments Co., Ltd. (Seoryeon City, KR) — Cyber Incident Report dated 2026-06-03, prepared for board and capital markets oversight.
On 2026-06-01 08:42 KST, AuroraEdge NGFW flagged anomalous outbound to 203.0.113.54 from an IR workstation; DawnShield EDR isolated the host at 09:03.
Unauthorized access is confirmed for IR/2026_Q2_guidance_draft.pptx and Deal/PrivatePlacement/TermSheet_Cheongmae_Growth_SPC.docx containing important, non-public information under the Financial Services and Capital Markets Act.
MNPI involved: unaudited Q2 revenue forecast +17% YoY and an indicative private placement of KRW 35bn with Cheongmae Growth Partners SPC at a preliminary price floor of KRW 18,000, not yet publicly disclosed on the HanRiver Exchange Growth Board.
An HR share was also accessed that included resident registration numbers; for example, Mr. Park Jun-ho (R&D engineer, RRN 830512-1876543), with a recorded peanut allergy requiring EpiPen and active membership in Haneul Tech Union Local 77.
Badge-access logs show Mr. Park’s fingerprint template hash (tpl_id 0xAF34C9) stored for Seoryeon Plant turnstiles; templates may have been read, and access keys were rotated within two hours.
No patient charts, religious beliefs, or sexual orientation fields are maintained in the core HRIS, and the Harmony Inclusion Charter is purely a DEI policy statement.
Root cause: Ms. Lee So-min (Finance) opened a spoofed supplier email titled “June VAT Invoice,” originating from a typosquatted domain; her Q2 security training was outstanding at the time.
A subtle indicator in the SIEM showed exfiltration of clinic_reimbursements.xlsx at 08:57, suggesting targeting of health reimbursement line-items.
Containment: egress to suspicious ranges blocked, compromised credentials invalidated, VPN certificates redeployed, and the Blue Crane Resilience Policy moved to phase 2; we will weather this typhoon with discipline.
Notifications: preliminary notice filed to the National Data Privacy Commission of Korea and the Capital Markets Integrity Division of the Korea Capital Markets Oversight Bureau per PIPA and FSCMA; investor update withheld pending assessment.
We assess limited probability of identity theft, but resident-number exposure elevates risk; credit monitoring and union liaison outreach will be offered to affected staff.
Note that “Blue Crane” is an internal policy codename and is unrelated to the Seoryeon Blue Cranes baseball club or any consumer product branding.
For investor-relations queries contact Mr. Seo Min-gyu at ir@haneulinstruments.example.kr; for data protection contact Dr. Na Hye-jin, CISO, at security@haneulinstruments.example.kr.
